summary: Frontend-only verification of iteration 3 targeted changes (treasury removal, mascot swap, Buy GOAT7 CTA, hero social icons, security pillar rename). 11 of 12 acceptance criteria pass; 1 real bug found — ROADMAP Phase 01 still references 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup'.

ui_bugs.issue: Phase 01 still lists 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' as a bullet. Violates spec 'remove all references to Treasury Wallet ... Multi-Sig Treasury throughout site.' Visible in DOM under #roadmap section.

action_items: Edit /app/frontend/src/lib/goat-data.js ROADMAP[0].items: replace 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' with a neutral milestone such as 'Community channels & contributor onboarding' or simply remove the item. After fix, verify page contains neither 'treasury' nor 'multi-sig' substrings (case-insensitive) anywhere outside the disclaimer/FAQ disclaimers.
critical_code_review_comments: ROADMAP Phase 01 first bullet still contains 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' — the data file change missed this entry while removing treasury elsewhere.

All other iteration-3 surfaces correctly updated: Hero treasury box & copy-treasury-button removed, CA still shows 'TBA' with working copy toast, hero-buy-button renders 'Buy GOAT7' wired to SOCIALS.buy, three href='#' social icons (telegram/x/discord) present with correct data-testids, mascot /mascot-goat.png loads (1024x1024, 200), Security pillar index 3 correctly renamed to 'Community Governed' with required body copy, Whitepaper button fires 'coming soon' toast (href='#'), Footer Treasury on Solscan removed and Resources list shows the 4 expected items, FAQ section contains no 'treasury wallet' text, no JS page errors on load.
Header still exposes a 'Connect Wallet' button — explicitly allowed by spec (only hero CTA was to be renamed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hero/security/footer/whitepaper/mascot/mobile criteria verified pass. Only remaining failure is the ROADMAP Phase 01 bullet 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' in /app/frontend/src/lib/goat-data.js line ~44. After main agent fixes, retest by checking that document.body.innerText (case-insensitive) contains neither 'treasury wallet' nor 'multi-sig' anywhere on the home page. Note: tokenomics & FAQ data-testid patterns differ from my probe selectors — they render via tabs/accordions; existing iteration_2 confirmed they work, so no further action needed there.
rca_of_the_issue: When refactoring treasury references in iteration 3, the developer cleaned the TOKEN object, Hero component, Footer, FAQ array, and SECURITY_PILLARS in goat-data.js, but missed the ROADMAP[0].items[0] string literal 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' inside the same file. Reproduction: visit https://solana-goat-token.preview.emergentagent.com, scroll to #roadmap, observe Phase 01 card -> first bullet. Mitigation: replace that bullet text in /app/frontend/src/lib/goat-data.js (hot reload will pick it up; no restart needed).
